R.title: R for Data Science (free book by Hadley Wickham)

Data Visualization.title: Storytelling with Data blog (Cole Nussbaumer Knaflic)

plan.plan_summary: This 12-week plan focuses on building a strong foundation in AWS and Databricks, allocating the majority of the time to these core skills. It strategically integrates polish items like Spark, ETL, Airflow, dbt, Snowflake, and Data Modeling into spare hours, ensuring a comprehensive learning experience within the given budget and deadline.

weeks.focus: AWS Fundamentals and Introduction to Databricks
Deep Dive into AWS and Databricks Concepts
AWS Skill Builder and Databricks Quickstart
AWS Skill Builder and Spark Fundamentals
AWS Documentation and Spark with PySpark
ETL Fundamentals with dbt and Airflow Quickstart
Snowflake Quickstarts and Kimball Group Techniques
Consolidation and Review of AWS and Databricks
